title: Astral Haven 001
description: A epic rpg built around story-rich, character progression, and crafting. It supports 15-minute play with a gentle progression loop and strong player agency.

title: Verdant Haven 002
description: A exciting action adventure built around boss fights, cinematic, and combat. It supports 15-minute play with a deep progression loop and strong player agency.

title: Iron Haven 003
description: A challenging strategy built around economy, base building, and turn-based. It supports 15-minute play with a deep progression loop and strong player agency.
